AND HE SET EPHRAIM BEFORE MANASSEH. In the enunciation of the blessing.32Viz., “God make thee as Ephraim and as Manasseh.”

If Lehi was a descendant of Manasseh, shouldn’t he have lived in the northern “kingdom of Israel” which was sacked in 721 BC? This is an excellent question. If Lehi’s forefathers had lived with the rest of the tribe of Manasseh, in the northern kingdom, they would have been sacked by the Assyrians (see maps 5 & 9). They would have become part of the “lost ten tribes.” Apparently, many of the…
